events.title: US Current Account
events.impact: Measures net trade in goods and services. Significant deviations can signal currency pressure.
events.why_it_matters: Affects USD strength and overall trade balance sentiment.

events.title: US Building Permits
events.impact: Leading indicator for housing market health.
events.why_it_matters: Housing is a key driver of economic growth.

events.title: US New Home Sales
events.why_it_matters: Direct signal of consumer confidence and mortgage rate impact.

events.title: US Crude Oil Stocks Change
events.why_it_matters: Primary driver for Oil ETFs and energy sector holdings.

events.title: CA Interest Rate
events.impact: Direct impact on CAD and Canadian equity valuations.
events.why_it_matters: Determines borrowing costs and inflation fight in Canada.

events.title: US Interest Rate
events.impact: The single most important macro event. Moves almost all asset classes.
events.why_it_matters: Sets the cost of capital for the global economy.
